titles.title: That's What This Is All About

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There are times when I get a little happy, I fill up so much I have to let it out; Oh if you could only see what I'm seein' Then you'll understand what this is all about.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I have come behind the veil to see His face, Out of all the world in a secret place; And there's so much glory, it makes me want to shout, Brother, that's what this is all about.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I am hidden from the world and all its chaos, Been delivered from the chains of fear and doubt; They may laugh and criticize this little message, But I know that's just what this is all about.
